task_details.title: Implement PDF generation with puppeteer in intelligence-agent
task_details.description: backend/lib/intelligence-agent.js:614 has a placeholder that writes markdown files instead of PDFs

changes.implementation: Puppeteer PDF generation with markdown-to-HTML converter

duplicate_assignments.pattern: Task repeatedly assigned to workspace-anton despite file not existing there

root_cause.issue: Task router does not validate workspace compatibility before assignment
symptoms: File path in task description not checked against workspace contents
Task remains 'open' despite being complete in another workspace
Automatic reassignment when agents report 'cannot complete'
root_cause.impact: Agent resources wasted on impossible tasks

required_actions.sql: UPDATE tasks SET status='completed', completed_at='2026-03-05T21:33:06Z', workspace='workspace-felix', commit_hash='9265008ea92a7df2988b94e0a949af4ec0ff0bcb' WHERE id=8807
required_actions.reason: Stop infinite reassignment loop (27+ duplicate assignments)

required_actions.description: Validate target file exists in workspace before task assignment
required_actions.implementation: Check file path existence in target workspace during task routing

required_actions.description: Verify task not already complete in another workspace before assignment
required_actions.implementation: Query all workspaces for task completion status

required_actions.description: Stop reassigning tasks that cannot be completed in target workspace
required_actions.implementation: Flag tasks with repeated 'cannot complete' reports for human review

agent_outcome.blocker: Target file does not exist in assigned workspace
agent_outcome.resolution: Close task as complete (already done in workspace-felix)

immediate: Close task #8807 in database with completion metadata
Stop all further assignments of this task
Review other tasks with similar wrong-workspace patterns
short_term: Add workspace compatibility validation to task router
Implement file existence check before assignment
long_term: Implement automatic workspace detection based on file paths
Add task completion verification across all workspaces
Create dashboard to identify stuck/impossible tasks

system_health.user_impact: Task appears incomplete despite being done
